_aboutme: ABOUTME: Curated faction map + vendor-coverage exclusions for the derived sources table
ABOUTME: (factionSource value -> tagFaction label tag; see docs/item-schema.md).
faction_tags follows the game's own convention (tag = 'tagFaction' + factionSource value),
kept explicit so a new faction in a patch is reviewed, not silently joined. Drift guards
(scripts/build_derived.py): a factionSource value missing from faction_tags fails the build;
the set of faction-sourced augments with NO vendor row must equal unsold_augments exactly
(all 8 are dev template blanks, present in the deposit but sold by no vendor), so a real
augment losing vendor coverage, or a blank gaining it, fails loudly.
Verified at build 19149150: 13 factionSource values, 292 faction-sourced augments,
284 covered by faction vendor tier tables.
